description: SenseR aap ki store ke maujooda cameras ko AI-powered dashboard mein tabdeel karta hai jo staff ki sargarmi, customer ki amd o raft, aur store operations ki real-time visibility deta hai.
sectionLabel: SenseR Aap Ko Kya Dikhata Hai

featureCards.title: Employee Visibility
items: Staff ki hazri aur shift tracking
Floor par maujoodgi aur bekar waqt

benefits.title: Retail Brands SenseR Kyun Istemal Karti Hain
items: Chori aur staff ka ghalat istemal kam karein
Customer ki amd o raft samjhein
Store ke faislay tezi se karein

form.subtitle: Apni details darj karein taake hum aap se rabta kar sakein!
